title: Fix parsing for arrays of values in image changes
body: The current parser interprets ["echo"] as the literal string "echo" - quotes and all. The correct behavior per Docker is to treat it as a JSON string - that is, the quotes delineate the beginning and end of the string, and are NOT included.

comments.body: @baude PTAL - should fix your quoting issue
Test failure is consistent, I'll check it tomorrow morning.
I *think* we're going to go green now, @baude
Pushed major changes - ended up needing a near-complete rewrite of parsing for `--change` to try and restore some sanity.

Apparently we have a completely separate set of parsing code in libpod's `Commit()` function. I'm going to tear that out and convert to the standard change parsing.
Pushed a new commit that swaps `podman commit` over to the new parsing logic.
It's green again. @baude @rhatdan @vrothberg PTAL and merge
